[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0000000000 a
1 1010010001 4
2 0110100000 3
3 0000000011 2
4 1010010101 5
5 0111101011 7
6 0111100111 7
7 0100001000 2

01 10 0010000001 2
12 21 0111100011 6
23 32 0100000000 1
34 43 0000001000 1
45 54 0010011000 3
56 65 1110010000 4
67 76 0000000000 a match 0
70 07 0000000001 1

02 20 0010000101 3
13 31 0100001000 2 match 7
24 42 0010000100 2
35 53 0100001000 2 match 7
46 64 0010010100 3
57 75 0000001001 2
60 06 1010010100 4
71 17 0000001011 3

03 30 0000000000 a match 0
14 41 0010001000 2
25 52 0110000001 3
36 63 0100000000 1
47 74 0000001000 1
50 05 1010010001 4 match 1
61 16 0110100000 3 match 2
72 27 0000000011 2 match 3

04 40 0010010100 3
15 51 0110001001 4
26 62 0110100100 4
37 73 0000001000 1
